Here’s the current snapshot for today in Indianapolis (Apr 2, 2026):

Conditions: Mostly sunny to partly cloudy

Temperature: ~31–41°F this morning, rising into the low–mid 40s°F

Wind: Light to moderate

Precipitation: Little to none expected

WRTV Indianapolis

What it feels like

Cool and crisp overall

Chilly early, more comfortable by midday

Not a stormy day (unlike earlier this week’s pattern)

Quick takeaway

👉 A cool but calm spring day — good for being outside if you layer up.
